flashcards.front: What is the formula for the trapezoidal rule?
What MPI operation is used to combine partial results?
What is the error term for the trapezoidal rule?
How is the integration domain divided among processes?
flashcards.back: The interval [a,b] is divided into p equal segments, each processed by a different MPI rank

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of MPI_Bcast in trapezoidal rule implementation?
flashcards.back: To distribute input parameters (a, b, n) from the root process to all other processes
